title: Male/Female Octave PASS: 5 general QN pairs — Fibonacci sequence and arbitrary
_fixture_purpose: General witnesses for the 4× octave ratio across diverse QNs. Includes: Fibonacci QN pairs (the natural QA sequence), arbitrary (b,e) pairs. In all cases, female=(2e,b,a,2d) and female_product=4×male_product exactly. Note: (2,1,3,4) female of the fundamental is itself a valid male; its female (2,2,4,6) has product 96=4×24 — showing the transform can chain indefinitely, each step adding 2 more octaves.

pairs.note: chained: (2,1,3,4) is female of fundamental; its female is (2,2,4,6) prod=96=4×24=16×6 (4 octaves above fundamental male)

chaining_note: The transform composes: male→female→female_of_female→... Each step multiplies product by 4 (adds 2 octaves). So: (1,1,2,3) prod=6 (0 octaves), (2,1,3,4) prod=24 (2 octaves), (2,2,4,6) prod=96 (4 octaves), (4,2,6,8) prod=384 (6 octaves), etc.
